mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.nick_name, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.remark, u.deleted, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.nick_name, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.remark, u.deleted, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0
